name: Cocoa Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Generously grease and flour a 12-cup Bundt pan.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Mix well.
3. Add eggs, shortening, buttermilk or sour milk, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Beat on low speed for 1 minute, scraping the sides of the bowl frequently.
4. Increase the mixer speed to high and beat for an additional 3 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared Bundt pan.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 50 to 55 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it to a wire rack. Cool completely.
8. Drizzle with chocolate glaze.  To make sour milk, mix 1 1/2 tablespoons vinegar with enough milk to equal 1 1/2 cups.
